title: protium macgregorii
intro: Protium macgregorii, also known as the Philippine ironwood or Philippine mahogany, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Protium macgregorii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing fever, pain, and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Protium macgregorii include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and other health conditions.
